message.abstract:
<jats:title>Short Abstract</jats:title>
                <jats:p>We estimate the distribution of serial intervals for 468 confirmed cases of COVID-19 reported in 93 Chinese cities by February 8, 2020. The mean and standard deviation are 3.96 (95% CI 3.53-4.39) and 4.75 (95% CI 4.46-5.07) days, respectively, with 12.6% of reports indicating pre-symptomatic transmission.</jats:p>
                <jats:sec>
                  <jats:title>One sentence summary</jats:title>
                  <jats:p>We estimate the distribution of serial intervals for 468 confirmed cases of COVID-19 reported in 93 Chinese cities by February 8, 2020.</jats:p>
                </jats:sec>
title: The serial interval of COVID-19 from publicly reported confirmed cases
